# CasinoScout

> Independent online casino reviews for Canadian players. Real money tested, licences verified, bonuses analysed.

CasinoScout.co provides expert casino reviews, bonus comparisons, and gambling guides for players in Canada. All casinos are tested with real deposits. Updated March 2026.
